insight: Boss has no native MMOCore/MMOItems API hook (not in plugin.yml softdepend, HookManager, or anywhere in source). But MMO rewards still work two ways without MythicMobs: drag any MMOItems item straight into the Drops menu (stored as a real NBT ItemStack, drops on death), or run MMO give commands from the boss's death commands (console, or per top-damager with {killer}/{player}/{damage}/{order}).
